tasks.subject: Task 1: RuntimeProbe dataclass + ComputeProvider.probe_runtime ABC default
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Land the probe surface contract. New providers can opt out by inheriting the default; existing providers compile unchanged.

**Files:** Create `src/kinoforge/core/runtime_probe.py`, `tests/core/test_runtime_probe.py`. Modify `src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py` line ~218.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_runtime_probe.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/runtime_probe.py", "src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py", "tests/core/test_runtime_probe.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_runtime_probe.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["RuntimeProbe frozen dataclass with 8 fields", "ComputeProvider.probe_runtime ABC method with default None", "LocalProvider/SkyPilotProvider instantiate without override", "RunPodProvider inherits default until Task 2"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: RunPodProvider.probe_runtime — wraps GraphQL util endpoint
tasks.description:
**Goal:** RunPod probe_runtime override distinguishing 404 vs early-boot vs live.

**Files:** Modify `src/kinoforge/providers/runpod/util.py` (add `probe` method), `src/kinoforge/providers/runpod/__init__.py` (override `probe_runtime`), `tests/core/test_runtime_probe.py`.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_runtime_probe.py -v -k runpod`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/providers/runpod/util.py", "src/kinoforge/providers/runpod/__init__.py", "tests/core/test_runtime_probe.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_runtime_probe.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["RunPodGraphQLUtilEndpoint.probe distinguishes 404 from null-runtime", "RunPodProvider.probe_runtime override", "TransportError propagates", "Local TZ timestamp"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Verdict enum + _classify_ephemeral branch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Sentinel-based dispatch to `_classify_ephemeral` handling only verdicts the sparse substrate supports.

**Files:** Modify `src/kinoforge/core/reaper.py` lines 24-41, 56-67, 247+. Create `tests/core/test_classify_ephemeral.py`.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_classify_ephemeral.py tests/core/test_reaper.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/reaper.py", "tests/core/test_classify_ephemeral.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_classify_ephemeral.py tests/core/test_reaper.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Verdict enum gains 3 members", "DEFAULT_APPLY_POLICY includes GC_404 only", "classify() dispatches on sentinel", "_classify_ephemeral decision tree matches spec §3.5", "No heartbeat key reads"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: sweep() unions EphemeralIndex rows + per-tick probe cache
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Sweeper discovers ephemeral pods via index union + probe cache + ledger-wins-on-overlap.

**Files:** Modify `src/kinoforge/core/reaper_actor.py` line 297+. Create `tests/core/test_sweep_ephemeral_union.py`.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_sweep_ephemeral_union.py tests/core/test_reaper_actor.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/reaper_actor.py", "tests/core/test_sweep_ephemeral_union.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_sweep_ephemeral_union.py tests/core/test_reaper_actor.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["sweep unions ledger ∪ ephemeral_index.rows", "ledger wins on overlap", "per-tick probe cache", "failure isolation per pod", "stall_history kwarg plumbed"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: SweeperLoop owns bounded stall history
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Cross-tick stall samples in bounded in-memory deque per pod; evicted on pod disappearance.

**Files:** Modify `src/kinoforge/core/sweeper.py` lines 111-263. Create `tests/core/test_sweeper_loop_stall_history.py`.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_sweeper_loop_stall_history.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/sweeper.py", "tests/core/test_sweeper_loop_stall_history.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_sweeper_loop_stall_history.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["_stall_history dict on SweeperLoop", "deque maxlen bounded", "history pruned per tick", "reload preserves history"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: act_on_verdict handles GC_404, SKIP_NO_PROBE, PROBE_FAILED
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New verdicts trigger side-effects: GC_404 removes index row, SKIP/FAILED log WARN-once.

**Files:** Modify `src/kinoforge/core/reaper_actor.py`. Create `tests/integration/test_sweeper_reaps_ephemeral_stall.py`, `tests/integration/test_sweep_skypilot_ephemeral_warn_once.py`.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/integration/test_sweeper_reaps_ephemeral_stall.py tests/integration/test_sweep_skypilot_ephemeral_warn_once.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/reaper_actor.py", "tests/integration/test_sweeper_reaps_ephemeral_stall.py", "tests/integration/test_sweep_skypilot_ephemeral_warn_once.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/integration/test_sweeper_reaps_ephemeral_stall.py tests/integration/test_sweep_skypilot_ephemeral_warn_once.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GC_404 removes row, no destroy", "SKIP_NO_PROBE WARN-once", "PROBE_FAILED dedup with error_class", "scripted stall sequence drives destroy", "_LOG_ONLY_VERDICTS dispatch"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: kinoforge reap CLI integration + session-claim race test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** CLI emits ephemeral pods; --apply runs GC_404; one-shot skips STALL; SweeperStats counters; session-claim race confirmed safe.

**Files:** Modify `src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py` (2116, 2177), `src/kinoforge/core/sweeper_metrics.py`. Create `tests/integration/test_reap_cli_ephemeral.py`, `tests/integration/test_sweeper_skips_on_session_claim.py`.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/integration/test_reap_cli_ephemeral.py tests/integration/test_sweeper_skips_on_session_claim.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py", "src/kinoforge/core/sweeper_metrics.py", "tests/integration/test_reap_cli_ephemeral.py", "tests/integration/test_sweeper_skips_on_session_claim.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/integration/test_reap_cli_ephemeral.py tests/integration/test_sweeper_skips_on_session_claim.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CLI dry-run lists ephemeral", "--apply GC_404 removes row", "one-shot skips STALL_REAP", "JSONL action literals", "SweeperStats counters increment", "session-claim race safe"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: AST invariant — _classify_ephemeral consumes no heartbeat keys
tasks.description:
**Goal:** AST-walking test prevents future refactor from re-coupling ephemeral branch to heartbeat substrate.

**Files:** Create `tests/test_classify_ephemeral_no_heartbeat_keys.py`.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/test_classify_ephemeral_no_heartbeat_keys.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/test_classify_ephemeral_no_heartbeat_keys.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/test_classify_ephemeral_no_heartbeat_keys.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["AST walker finds function", "zero forbidden key reads", "FunctionNotFound on rename"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Live smoke — RED scaffold (committed BEFORE live spend)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Live test scaffold committed RED before any RunPod spend per project durability rule.

**Files:** Create `tests/live/test_runpod_ephemeral_sweeper_smoke.py`.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/live/test_runpod_ephemeral_sweeper_smoke.py -v` (collects + SKIPS)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/live/test_runpod_ephemeral_sweeper_smoke.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/live/test_runpod_ephemeral_sweeper_smoke.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["File collects cleanly", "module-level skip in place", "no live API hits", "committed before live spend"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Live smoke — GREEN evidence on RunPod
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Run live smoke against real RunPod with pod-stats polling; capture evidence; remove skip.

**Files:** Modify `tests/live/test_runpod_ephemeral_sweeper_smoke.py`. Create `tests/live/evidence/2026-06-28-sweeper-ephemeral-reap/`.

**Verify:** `pixi run preflight && pixi run pytest tests/live/test_runpod_ephemeral_sweeper_smoke.py -v -m live`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/live/test_runpod_ephemeral_sweeper_smoke.py", "tests/live/evidence/2026-06-28-sweeper-ephemeral-reap/"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run preflight && pixi run pytest tests/live/test_runpod_ephemeral_sweeper_smoke.py -v -m live", "acceptanceCriteria": ["preflight exit 0", "sweeper destroyed pod within 240s", "evidence files committed", "spend ≤ $0.40", "post-run ledger empty"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
